nasb.text: Say to the king and the queen mother, “Take a lowly seat, For your beautiful crown Has come down from your head.”

esv.text: Say to the king and the queen mother: “Take a lowly seat, for your beautiful crown has come down from your head.”

cnv.text: 你要對君王和太后說： “你們應從寶座下來， 因為華麗的冠冕 已經從你們的頭上脫下來了。”

ccb.text: 耶和华让我对君王和太后说： “从宝座上下来吧， 因为你们头上华美的王冠将要掉落。”
